programmes.show_description: A 911 call about stolen gas leads Lieutenant Stacey to the local school, Patrolman Gibson is called to a suspected carjacking, and Officer Rugel finds marijuana.
Jared and Johnny's epic mission grinds to a halt, Roscoe battles the elements on a world-famous rally, and Turbo is flagged down by the boys in blue.
A heavy loader carrying cardboard tips over. Rural Staffordshire is seemingly no match for former army boy Jim. Snow threatens to leave rescuer Mark stranded.
When a fully loaded double deck curtain-sided HGV rolls over on the A6, Fluff and his team need to create a second mess to solve the first.
Teleshopping.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Award winning eFOLDi lightweight electric folding mobility scooters.
Shop JML, the home for clever ideas.
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
A Peugeot driver tries to give interceptor Ky Kirk the slip around the bumpy backstreets of Nottingham. Ky sends out an SOS to colleagues Rob and Dan who gun it to the scene.
There's a hunt for a dodgy Fiesta. But with the interceptors on its tail, the driver stacks the vehicle into a roundabout and the occupants go to ground.
New Jersey police crack down on reckless driving. A cop is called to an exploding minibus and attends a three-car crash on one of the state's most dangerous roads. (Ep1)
Patrol officer Malek Badeer stops a car with a dangerous DIY repair job, and patrol man Matt Rugel's routine traffic stop proves unfortunate for a wanted man.
Sergeant Rob Marks hunts down a man with a gun, a novice driver causes a three-car crash and a busy shopping plaza is the scene of a daylight shooting.
Epic western starring John Wayne and Montgomery Clift. A cattle drive from Texas to Missouri in the aftermath of the Civil War is marked by conflict. (1948)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

A crime spree appears to be the work of a cold-blooded killer who was believed to have died in prison.
Mulder and Scully investigate a UFO sighting in Tennessee, but their witness changes his story. Probing further, they find themselves up against a formidable foe.
The agents investigate a ministry led by a man whose son seems to possess the power to heal - and to kill - with the touch of his hand.
Mulder and Scully track a wolf-like creature linked to Native American legend.

Documentary series following the crews who keep Britain moving when a big freeze strikes.
A recycling plant needs two portable cabins replaced.
Recovery Op Jim is called to the scene of two crashed artics on the M1. But as the team begin to pull the truck and trailer apart they discover the crash has split the oil tank.
Carl Andrews takes to the wheel with a gargantuan load, Russell's mobile classroom gets shaken and his engine cooked, and the Ferris's dodge raging bush fires.
All hell breaks loose for Turbo, Christian racks up massive mileage with a huge load, and the Wise couple feel the pressure of a fuel-draining headwind.
